title: I see. Here are some of the best translation apps for iPhone that…
body:
I see. Here are some of the best translation apps for iPhone that are known for their Korean language support and high user satisfaction:
- Flitto
- Malang Malang Genie Talk
- Naver Papago AI Translation

Flitto and Malang Malang Genie Talk are known for their Korean language support and high user satisfaction¹. Naver Papago AI Translation is also a popular app that supports Korean language translation¹. You can download these apps from the App Store.

I hope this helps!

출처: Bing과의 대화, 2023. 4. 5.(1) 번역 앱 TOP4 총정리 (최고의 통역 어플). https://bing.com/search?q=%ed%95%9c%ea%b5%ad%ec%96%b4+%eb%b2%88%ec%97%ad+%ec%96%b4%ed%94%8c+%ec%b6%94%ec%b2%9c 액세스한 날짜 2023. 4. 5..
(2) 번역 앱 TOP4 총정리 (최고의 통역 어플). https://liferesearch.tistory.com/entry/번역-앱-TOP4 액세스한 날짜 2023. 4. 5..
(3) TOP 7 번역기, 번역사이트 추천 (2023 순위) - 탑 팁 Korea. https://toptip.co.kr/translator/ 액세스한 날짜 2023. 4. 5..
(4) Google 번역. https://translate.google.com/?hl=ko 액세스한 날짜 2023. 4. 5..
(5) 무료 번역 어플, 통역 앱 추천 TOP5 - 유용한 어플 추천. https://appbiabi.com/translator-application/ 액세스한 날짜 2023. 4. 5..
